headline: Is It Time To Reassess Procter & Gamble (PG) After A 12% One Year Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Procter & Gamble stock offers solid value at today’s price, or if you are better off waiting for a clearer signal, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying. The stock last closed at US$142.96, with a 1.2% gain over the past 7 days, a 3.5% decline over 30 days, a modest 0.8% gain year to date, and a 12.3% decline over the past year. This sits against a 7.9% gain over 3 years and a 22.2% gain over 5 years. Recent price moves sit against a...
